caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black baseball cap with a winged logo, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT!", and a gold chain. He wears headphones and speaks into a professional microphone. Behind him, a white backdrop features the word "HUSTLE" and several stars. To his right, a screen displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". On-screen overlays include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and a smaller "BOSS TALK 101" graphic on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man is seen laughing and smiling, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he continues to speak and react. The background and equipment remain static, while the man's head moves slightly and his mouth opens and closes as he speaks and laughs.
